drawer.empty_no_ankys: no ankys yet. write your first one.
drawer.empty_write_here: write an anky to see it here.
chat.connection_lost: connection lost — reload to try again.
writing.default_prompt: what is alive in you right now?
you.empty_copy: your phone holds the identity. once you log in, this page becomes your profile and your ankys.
anky.login_to_talk_html: login with your phone to talk with this anky
reflection.engine_recharging: the reflection engine is recharging. your anky will be reflected on soon — the watchdog retries every 5 minutes.

stream.error_load: error: could not load your writing. refresh to try again.
stream.error_no_text: error: no writing text found for this session.
